custom_detection_rules.description: Detects execution of known credential dumping tools targeting LSASS or SAM
custom_detection_rules.query: DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ('sekurlsa', 'lsadump', 'mimikatz') or (FileName =~ 'procdump.exe' and ProcessCommandLine has 'lsass') or (FileName =~ 'rundll32.exe' and ProcessCommandLine has 'comsvcs' and ProcessCommandLine has 'MiniDump')

custom_detection_rules.description: Detects volume shadow copy deletion indicating ransomware activity
custom_detection_rules.query: DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where (FileName =~ 'vssadmin.exe' and ProcessCommandLine has 'delete shadows') or (FileName =~ 'wmic.exe' and ProcessCommandLine has 'shadowcopy delete') or (FileName =~ 'bcdedit.exe' and ProcessCommandLine has_any ('recoveryenabled no', 'bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures'))

custom_detection_rules.description: Detects PowerShell with encoded commands, download cradles, or AMSI bypass
custom_detection_rules.query: DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where FileName in~ ('powershell.exe', 'pwsh.exe') | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ('-enc', 'FromBase64', 'DownloadString', 'WebClient', 'IEX', 'Invoke-Expression', 'AmsiUtils', 'amsiInitFailed')

custom_detection_rules.description: Detects PsExec service installation for lateral movement
custom_detection_rules.query: DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where (FileName in~ ('PsExec.exe', 'PsExec64.exe')) or (InitiatingProcessFileName =~ 'services.exe' and FileName =~ 'PSEXESVC.exe')

custom_detection_rules.description: Detects living-off-the-land binaries being used for downloading payloads
custom_detection_rules.query: DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where FileName in~ ('mshta.exe', 'certutil.exe', 'regsvr32.exe', 'msbuild.exe', 'cmstp.exe') | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ('http://', 'https://', 'javascript:', '-decode', '-urlcache', 'scrobj.dll')
